free_text: Properties of the E1 giant resonance built on the
Melamine (C3H6N6) target with nitrogen enriched to 99%
in 15N evaporated onto carbon backing. Total
Target thickness determined using 5.47-MeV alphas from
fitting procedure and reproducibility of data points.
Data taken from tables in thesis.
Plastic scintillators located above each gamma
detector operated in anticoincidence mode to provide
NaI detectors calibrated using 4.44-MeV gamma from a
Bismuth germanate crystal surrounded by thick
A0 coefficient from Legendre polymonial fit to data.
